essence: Loads, unloads, and transports luggage and cargo to keep flights running smoothly.

identity.title: Baggage Handler / Ramp Agent
identity.summary: Moves luggage, guides aircraft, and supports ground operations to ensure safe and efficient flight turnaround.

salary.notes: Overtime, shift allowances, and airport security roles can increase earnings.

qualifications: Ability to work outdoors in all weather

lifestyle.description: Ramp agents work on the airfield, loading luggage, operating equipment, and guiding aircraft. The role is physical, fast-paced, and often outdoors. It suits people who enjoy active work and teamwork.
